title: Microsoft's "commitment to Windows quality" starts with overhaul of beta program
summary: Microsoft is reorganizing the Windows Insider Program to make beta builds more predictable and less confusing, streamlining the testing experience for Windows users who opt into early software versions.
content: Windows Insider builds remain confusing, but they should be more predictable.

zh.title: 微软的"Windows 质量承诺"从测试计划改革开始
zh.summary: 微软正在重组 Windows Insider 计划，使测试版本更加可预测和清晰，为选择加入早期软件版本的 Windows 用户简化测试体验。

title: Microsoft finally lets Windows 11 testers unlock experimental features without ViVeTool
summary: Microsoft is simplifying the Windows Insider Program by eliminating the need for third-party tools like ViVeTool to access experimental features, introducing an Experimental Channel and refreshed Beta Channel for clearer testing pathways.
content:
Microsoft is finally allowing Windows 11 testers to get access to experimental features without having to download a third-party app like ViVeTool. The changes are part of making the Windows Insider Program (WIP) less confusing, with Dev and Canary testing rings simplified into a new Experimental Channel alongside a refresh of the existing Beta Channel.
Microsoft has been using a technology called Controlled Feature Rollout (CFR) for years now, to gradually roll out new features to all Windows 11 users. While this is an industry standard, it's often frustrating to try and get access to experimental Windows 11 features and realize that Micro …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软最终允许 Windows 11 测试人员无需 ViVeTool 即可解锁实验功能
zh.summary: 微软通过消除对第三方工具（如 ViVeTool）的需求来简化 Windows Insider 计划，推出实验频道和更新的 Beta 频道，为测试提供更清晰的路径。

title: "Oobleck" still holds some surprises
summary: Researchers studying oobleck, a non-Newtonian fluid, have discovered that dense drops exhibit surprising behavior, spreading like liquid before stiffening into solid form under high shear rates.
content: Dense drops of oobleck with high shear rates spread out like a liquid before stiffening into a solid.

zh.title: "非牛顿流体"仍有意外发现
zh.summary: 研究人员在研究非牛顿流体时发现，浓密液滴表现出令人惊讶的行为，在高剪切速率下先像液体一样扩散，然后硬化成固体形式。

title: My go-to electric screwdriver is on sale for over 50 percent off today
summary: The Fanttik S1 Pro electric screwdriver is available for $39.99 (55% off) on Amazon with promo code YBRS9843, offering lightweight efficiency for small to medium household assembly and repair tasks.
content:
Fanttik, like Hoto, is quickly becoming a household name. The tool brand’s cordless wares are quiet, capable, and certainly more stylish than anything you’d find at your local Ace Hardware or neighborhood tool library. The S1 Pro electric screwdriver is a great example of the company’s penchant for attractive design, one you can currently grab on Amazon for an all-time low of $39.99 ($50 off) when you enter promo code YBRS9843 at checkout.
Fanttik S1 Pro Cordless Electric Screwdriver

Where to Buy:

 $89.99 $39.99 at Amazon (with code YBRS9843)

Unsurprisingly, Fanttik’s TikTok-worthy screwdriver isn’t going to rival a dedicated drill when it comes to torque or comfort, even when talking about the smaller 12V variety. Still, it’s more efficient than a manual screwdriver when it comes to performing small- to medium-sized tasks around the home, whether that be assembling a bed or tightening the screws on your bicycle seat — two things I used it for just this week. It’s lightweight and sleek, with a 220RPM motor, three torque settings, a circular LED light, and a dedicated button for screwing in or out.
In addition to the S1 Pro itself, you get a magnetic case that also houses the screwdriver and the 16 S2 hardened steel bits, which encompass everything from flathead and Allen heads to Torx bits for opening up smaller electronics. It’s also equipped with a 2,000mAh battery, which, according to Fanttik, should be enough to operate up to 340 screws. I haven’t put that claim to the test myself, but so far, so good.
More ways to save
Now through 10PM PT today, April 10th, Iniu’s 10,000mAh Portable Charger is on sale at Best Buy for just $15.99 ($13 off), which is the best price we’ve seen. I’ve become a big fan of Iniu’s compact charging banks in recent years, particularly the 2oW P61L-P1 on sale here, which comes with a built-in USB-C cable, a three-year warranty, and enough juice to charge an older smartphone model like the iPhone 15 to 65 capacity in just 25 minutes.
If

zh.title: 我最喜欢的电动螺丝刀今天打折超过50％
zh.summary: Fanttik S1 Pro电动螺丝刀在亚马逊上使用促销代码YBRS9843可以以39.99美元购买（打55折），为小型和中型家庭组装和维修任务提供轻量级效率。

title: Amazon Luna axes third-party game purchases
summary: Amazon Luna will discontinue third-party game purchases and remove previously purchased games on June 10th, 2026, ending support for EA, Ubisoft, and GOG storefronts on the cloud gaming platform.
content:
Amazon Luna announced a big change on Friday that will prevent players from purchasing third-party games and subscriptions. The cloud gaming service will remove previously purchased games on June 10th, 2026, though they'll still be available to play on other platforms through the EA, GOG, or Ubisoft accounts players used when purchasing the title.
In line with these changes, Amazon Luna will no longer support EA, Ubisoft, or GOG's third-party stores. It's also discontinuing subscriptions to Ubisoft Plus and Jackbox Games, and says it will cancel active subscriptions purchased through Luna at the end of the billing cycle. Amazon Luna is gett …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊Luna取消第三方游戏购买
zh.summary: 亚马逊Luna将于2026年6月10日停止第三方游戏购买并删除之前购买的游戏，结束对云游戏平台上EA、育碧和GOG商店的支持。

title: The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to ‘heart’
summary: Iranian content creation group Explosive Media has achieved viral success with AI-generated Lego videos satirizing recent military events, attributing their popularity to the emotional authenticity and humor in their creative approach.
content:
Donald Trump has spun the recent rescue of a downed airman whose fighter jet was destroyed behind Iranian borders as a resounding success. But the story is very different in one of the many viral, AI-generated Lego videos that have been produced by Iranian content creation group Explosive Media in the weeks since the US and Israel began dropping bombs on the country. In Explosive Media's music video take on how things played out, the US military is a joke for losing multiple planes and helicopters, and spending "$100 million just to save one guy." 
The video's shots of Lego jets exploding into $100 bills and golden coins reinforce the idea  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 伊朗乐高AI视频创作者将走红归功于"用心"
zh.summary: 伊朗内容创作小组Explosive Media通过AI生成的嘲讽最近军事事件的乐高视频获得了病毒式成功，将其受欢迎程度归功于创意方法中的情感真实性和幽默感。

title: YouTube increases Premium price again, says 90-second unskippable ads are a bug
summary: YouTube has increased Premium subscription prices to $15.99 monthly for individual plans, while characterizing 90-second unskippable ads in the free tier as an unintended bug rather than a feature.
content: An individual plan now cost $15.99 per month, and the free tier comes with buggy ads.

zh.title: YouTube再次提高Premium价格，称90秒不可跳过广告是个错误
zh.summary: YouTube已将高级订阅价格提高至每月15.99美元（个人计划），同时将免费版本中90秒的不可跳过广告描述为意外的错误，而非功能。

title: Little Snitch’s software counter surveillance jumps from Mac to Linux
summary: Network-monitoring app Little Snitch has launched a Linux version that tracks system process internet connections, though Objective Development clarifies it is not positioned as a security tool unlike its macOS counterpart.
content:
The popular macOS app Little Snitch brought its network-monitoring tools over to Linux this week. In a blog post announcing the launch, one of the developers at Objective Development shared some early results from using the app on Linux: "On Ubuntu, I found 9 system processes making internet connections over the course of one week. On macOS, we counted more than 100." 
While the Linux version of Little Snitch provides the same basic functionality for viewing and disabling unwanted connections, it's not exactly the same. Objective Development says it's "not a security tool," unlike the macOS version. 
According to Objective Development, Lin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Little Snitch的软件反监控功能从Mac扩展到Linux
zh.summary: 网络监控应用Little Snitch推出了Linux版本，可追踪系统进程的互联网连接，但Objective Development澄清它不是作为安全工具定位的，这与其macOS版本不同。

title: Oldest octopus fossil found to not be an octopus
summary: A fossil previously believed to be the oldest known octopus has been reclassified as a different species entirely, revising paleontological records of octopod evolution.
content: Supposed “first octopus” was something else entirely.

zh.title: 已知最古老的章鱼化石被发现不是章鱼
zh.summary: 一块之前被认为是已知最古老章鱼的化石已被重新分类为完全不同的物种，修正了古生物学关于头足动物进化的记录。

title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
summary: A stalking victim is suing OpenAI, alleging that ChatGPT amplified her abuser's delusions and that the company ignored multiple abuse warnings, including its own mass-casualty detection flag.
content: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

zh.title: 跟踪受害者控告OpenAI，指控ChatGPT加强了施暴者的妄想并忽视了她的警告

title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
summary: SusHi Tech 2026 in Tokyo will showcase emerging technology trends across AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment, featuring live humanoid robot demonstrations and industry discussions on autonomous driving and AI's impact on creative sectors.
content: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.

title: What leaked "SteamGPT" files could mean for the PC gaming platform's use of AI
summary: Leaked files suggest Valve is developing SteamGPT, an AI tool designed to help Steam moderators efficiently process the large volume of suspicious activity reports and security incidents on the platform.
content: AI tools could help moderators sift through mountains of suspicious incidents

zh.title: 泄露的"SteamGPT"文件对PC游戏平台AI应用意味着什么

title: Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they?
summary: Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act expires April 20th; while bipartisan reformers push for oversight improvements, powerful figures in both parties advocate for reauthorization despite concerns about warrantless domestic surveillance authority.
content:
A warrantless wiretapping authority that has facilitated surveillance for decades is up for renewal in Congress. Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), last reauthorized in 2024, is set to expire on April 20th. A bipartisan coalition of progressive Democrats and members of the hard-right Freedom Caucus say it's long overdue for reform. But they're up against powerful figures in both parties who want to deliver a "clean" reauthorization, even as critics warn the rule is allowing President Donald Trump's administration to spy on anyone - even Americans.
Section 702, first enacted in 2008, formally allows for the surv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 国会终于能关闭大规模监视漏洞——但他们会吗？
zh.summary: 《外国情报监视法》第702条将于4月20日失效；虽然跨党派改革者推动监督改进，但两党的强大势力主张重新授权，尽管存在对无搜查令国内监视权力的担忧。

title: Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off
summary: The second-generation Bose Soundlink Flex portable speaker is on sale for $109 at Amazon (31% off), featuring improved controls, adjustable EQ, and 12 hours of battery life in a weatherproof design.
content:
We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose Soundlink Flex. Right now, the portable speaker is on sale at Amazon in select colors starting at $109 ($50 off), nearly matching its best price to date. It’s also available at Walmart, Best Buy, and directly from Bose in all eight hues, albeit for $119 ($40 off) instead of $109.
Bose Soundlink Flex (second-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $159 $109 at Amazon
 $159 $119 at Walmart
 $159 $119 at Best Buy

A few years back, we crowned the original Soundlink Flex the best portable Bluetooth speaker under $200. It was an impressive speaker with expansive sound and a surprising amount of low-end thump, not to mention a rugged, IP67-rated design that allowed you to take it pretty much anywhere. It was a real winner in many respects, particularly for its compact size, which is probably why Bose didn’t feel the need to completely reinvent the wheel with the second iteration. 
The second-gen Flex is nearly identical to the first-gen model, only with a few subtle refinements. The travel-friendly speaker features a redesigned control strip with a new play / pause button and a power button that’s easier to locate — a welcome upgrade, given that the buttons on the original weren’t easy to use by feel alone. The 2nd Gen version also features adjustable EQ and support for higher-res AAC and aptX codecs, though you still get up to 12 hours of battery life, stereo pairing (if you own two), and weatherproofing, making the silicone-wrapped speaker a great picnic or poolside companion.
More deals and discounts
Lego’s adorable R2-D2 replica is currently on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Target for $79.99 ($20 off), matching its lowest price to date. The 1,050-piece set is a nice, decor-worthy homage to everyone’s favorite R2-series astromech droid, complete with a 180-degree swiveling head, an attachable pe

zh.title: Bose坚固型Soundlink Flex蓝牙扬声器最高降价50美元
zh.summary: Bose第二代Soundlink Flex便携式扬声器在亚马逊上以109美元出售（优惠31%），具有改进的控制、可调节的均衡器、12小时电池续航和防水设计。

title: Trump Mobile isn’t giving up just yet
summary: Trump Mobile shows signs of continued development with a new trademark application filing, despite seven months of social media silence and a delayed product launch on the Trump phone project.
content:
Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. We're back to being ignored, but the company is showing signs of life.
It's been nine months since Trump Mobile announced itself, seven months since the company updated any of its social media profiles, and two months since anyone replied to my emails. Based on that, you might think that everyone involved had given up on the whole idea, but this week we saw curious signs of life: a new trademark application. 
What's strangest about the application is that it was filed not for anything new, but f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Trump Mobile仍未放弃
zh.summary: 尽管七个月的社交媒体沉寂和Trump手机项目产品发布延迟，Trump Mobile通过新商标申请显示出继续开发的迹象。

title: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus
summary: Snap is moving forward with its long-delayed augmented reality glasses through a new partnership with Qualcomm, signaling concrete progress after years of development delay. The multi-year deal promises momentum on the next generation Spectacles.
content: Specs has long been teasing the next version of its augmented reality glasses. A new partnership with Qualcomm promises some movement in that department.

zh.title: Snap在多年停滞后更接近推出新AI眼镜
zh.summary: Snap通过与高通的新合作伙伴关系推进其长期延误的增强现实眼镜开发，标志着在多年开发延迟后取得具体进展。这项多年协议为下一代Spectacles眼镜带来了发展动力。

title: Snap is sticking with Qualcomm for its next AR glasses
summary: Snap's consumer AR glasses are set to launch this year powered by Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR chip under a multi-year strategic partnership. This milestone caps a decade of development for glasses designed to layer digital experiences over the real world.
content:
Snap's upcoming consumer AR glasses are still set to launch sometime this year, and they'll be powered by a Snapdragon XR chip from Qualcomm, according to an announcement of a "multi-year strategic agreement" between the companies.
Snap has been working on smart glasses for a decade, with the first model of its camera-equipped Spectacles glasses launching in 2016. But the past couple generations, which have been AR glasses capable of layering digital experiences over the real world, haven't been available to general consumers. The consumer Specs won't be the first time Qualcomm and Snap have worked together, as Snapdragon chips have powered …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap继续与高通合作推出下一代AR眼镜
zh.summary: 在多年战略伙伴关系下，Snap的消费级AR眼镜将于今年推出，搭载高通的Snapdragon XR芯片。这一里程碑标志着十年开发周期的完成，该眼镜旨在将数字体验叠加到现实世界。

title: Dad stuck in support nightmare after teen lied about age on Discord
summary: A data breach reveals Discord had knowledge of a teenager's actual age despite the user misrepresenting it, raising concerns about the platform's age verification safeguards. The incident highlights parent frustration getting support for underage account issues.
content: Data dump confirms dad's suspicions that Discord knew teen's age prior to hack.

zh.title: 青少年在Discord谎报年龄导致父亲陷入支持噩梦
zh.summary: 一起数据泄露事件表明，尽管用户谎报年龄，Discord仍掌握青少年的实际年龄信息，引发对平台年龄验证保障措施的担忧。这一事件凸显了父母在处理未成年人账户问题时获得支持的困难。

title: Gen Z’s love-hate relationship with AI
summary: A new Gallup poll shows Gen Z's AI enthusiasm has sharply declined, with only 18 percent expressing hopefulness despite heavy use in school and work. Young people feel pressured to use AI while growing increasingly skeptical of its actual benefits.
content:
Gen Z is increasingly disillusioned with AI - just not enough to stop using it. 
A new Gallup report released this week, based on responses from nearly 1,600 people ages 14 to 29 across the US, suggests the hype is wearing off for the digital-native generation as AI becomes more embedded in school and work. Enthusiasm is falling and resentment is growing, even as many young people feel they still need to use the technology. 
Gallup's poll, conducted in February and March this year, found Gen Z's feelings on AI have cooled significantly since last year. Only 18 percent said they were hopeful about the technology and 22 percent said they wer …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gen Z与AI的爱恨关系
zh.summary: 一项新的盖洛普民调显示，Z世代对AI的热情急剧下降，尽管在学校和工作中大量使用，但只有18%的人表示乐观。年轻人感到被迫使用AI，同时对其实际好处越来越怀疑。

title: YouTube Premium is getting pricier
summary: YouTube is raising Premium prices across all tiers, with individual plans jumping to $15.99 (up $2) and family plans to $26.99 (up $4). Price increases are in effect for new subscribers and rolling out to existing customers.
content:
YouTube Premium is getting more expensive in the US, with prices rising by $2 on standard individual accounts and as much as $4 for the family plan. The price hike is already in effect for new accounts, and is rolling out now for existing customers.
Premium's Individual plan now costs $15.99 per month, up from $13.99, while the five-person Family plan is $26.99, previously $22.99. Premium Lite, which removes "most" ads but doesn't include YouTube Music, is now $8.99 monthly, up from $7.99.
The new prices are live now for new signups, and 9to5Google reports that existing subscribers are beginning to be notified about the price hike via the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube Premium价格上涨
zh.summary: YouTube正在提高所有等级的Premium价格，个人计划上升至$15.99（上升$2），家庭计划上升至$26.99（上升$4）。价格上涨对新用户立即生效，并逐步推出给现有客户。

title: Rocket Report: Chinese version of Falcon 9 fails; Artemis depends on rapid heavy lift
summary: A Chinese competitor to SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket failed during launch as space exploration becomes increasingly geopolitically competitive. NASA's Artemis program underscores the strategic importance of reliable heavy-lift launch access.
content: “As space becomes increasingly strategic, access is no longer a luxury."

zh.title: 火箭报告：中国版猎鹰9号失败；阿耳忒弥斯取决于快速重型运载能力
zh.summary: 随着太空探索变得越来越具有地缘政治竞争性，SpaceX猎鹰9号的中国竞争对手在发射时失败。NASA的阿耳忒弥斯计划强调了可靠重型运载发射能力的战略重要性。

title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps
summary: Microsoft is removing redundant Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps including Notepad and Snipping Tool, consolidating AI access into subtler 'writing tools' menus. The underlying AI features remain embedded within apps.
content:
Microsoft is starting to remove "unnecessary" Copilot buttons from its Windows 11 apps. In the latest version of the Notepad app for Windows Insiders, Microsoft has removed the Copilot button in favor of a "writing tools" menu. The Copilot button in the Snipping Tool app also no longer appears when you select an area to capture.
The change is part of "reducing unnecessary Copilot entry points, starting with apps like Snipping Tool, Photos, Widgets and Notepad," that Microsoft promised to complete as part of its broader plan to fix Windows 11. While Copilot buttons are being removed, it looks like the underlying AI features are here to stay, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软开始从Windows 11应用中移除Copilot按钮
zh.summary: 微软正在从记事本和截图工具等Windows 11应用中移除冗余的Copilot按钮,将AI功能整合到更隐蔽的"写作工具"菜单中。底层AI功能仍然内嵌在应用中。

title: Orion helium leak no threat to Artemis II reentry, but will require redesign
summary: The Artemis II mission experienced helium leaks similar to previous flights, but this won't affect reentry safety. NASA will need to redesign the valves for future Artemis missions to prevent recurring issues.
content: After leaks on Artemis I and II, Orion's next flight to the Moon will need new valves.

zh.title: 猎户座氦气泄漏对阿尔忒弥斯II号再入无威胁，但需要重新设计
zh.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯II号任务经历了与之前飞行类似的氦气泄漏，但这不会影响再入安全。NASA需要为未来的阿尔忒弥斯任务重新设计阀门，以防止反复出现的问题。
